resources.string: No focused element was found. Try describing the full screen.
The focused element could not be captured.
What do you want to describe?
Configure Gemini, your API key, and image limits for chat.
Configure quick capture and RayoAI versions.

This feature requires enabling the RayoAI accessibility service. On Android 11 or higher, some devices may ask you to allow restricted settings before the service can be enabled. If it appears blocked, open the RayoAI app info screen in Settings, open More options, and allow restricted settings. The name and location of this option can vary by device and brand. Then return to Accessibility and enable RayoAI quick capture.
